headline: 1 High-Flying Stock to Own for Decades and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Expensive stocks often command premium valuations because the market thinks their business models are exceptional. However, the downside is that high expectations are already baked into their prices, leaving little room for error if they stumble even slightly.

content.title: 1 High-Flying Stock to Own for Decades and 2 We Turn Down
content.summary: Expensive stocks often command premium valuations because the market thinks their business models are exceptional. However, the downside is that high expectations are already baked into their prices, leaving little room for error if they stumble even slightly.

headline: IBM and Lam Research Announce Collaboration to Advance Sub-1nm Logic Scaling
summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) and Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ: LRCX) today announced a collaboration aimed at developing new processes and materials to support sub-1nm logic scaling. Building on a long record of successful partnerships, the new agreement will focus on the joint development of novel materials, fabrication processes, and High NA EUV lithography processes to advance IBM's logic scaling roadmap.

content.title: IBM and Lam Research Announce Collaboration to Advance Sub-1nm Logic Scaling
content.summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) and Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ: LRCX) today announced a collaboration aimed at developing new processes and materials to support sub-1nm logic scaling. Building on a long record of successful partnerships, the new agreement will focus on the joint development of novel materials, fabrication processes, and High NA EUV lithography processes to advance IBM's logic scaling roadmap.

thumbnail.caption:
L-R: Mukesh Khare, GM of IBM Semiconductors and VP of hybrid cloud at IBM Research; Vahid Vahedi, chief technology and sustainability officer at Lam Research. 
IBM and Lam Research have announced a collaboration to enable continued scaling, improved performance, and viable paths to production for sub-1nm logic devices.

headline: Assessing Lam Research (LRCX) Valuation After A Strong Year And Recent Pullback
summary: Lam Research stock after recent performance Lam Research (LRCX) has drawn attention after a mixed stretch in recent returns, with a roughly 0.1% gain year to date, a 26% rise over the past 3 months, and a 1-year total return near 190%. See our latest analysis for Lam Research.
